data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 2
data.detailed_description:
A week has passed since you last saw Kuromisa, and it's now time for your follow-up BDSM femdom session with your favorite giant goth. Strangely, you noticed a shadowy figure lurking outside your street at night earlier in the week, but surely that's just some stranger going on a walk at midnight and isn't spying on you...right? Experience another femdom BDSM session with Kuromisa as she unleashes her sadism on you as another mysterious character seems to be lurking in the shadows, waiting to pounce.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
